code: import{io}from'socket.io-client';let socket=null;let chargers=[];let isConnected=false;let listeners=[];function resolveServerUrl(){if(process.env.REACT_APP_WS_URL){return process.env.REACT_APP_WS_URL;}if(typeof window!=='undefined'){return window.location.origin;}return'http://localhost:8000';}function toChargerStatus(charger){return{id:charger.id,name:charger.id,status:charger.status,voltage:Number(charger.voltage||0),current:Number(charger.current||0),power:Number(charger.power||0),temperature:Number(charger.temperature||0),errorCode:charger.errorCode,lastUpdated:new Date(charger.lastUpdated)};}function emitChargers(){const snapshot=[...chargers];listeners.forEach(listener=>listener(snapshot));}function upsertCharger(charger){const idx=chargers.findIndex(item=>item.id===charger.id);if(idx>=0){chargers[idx]=charger;}else{chargers.push(charger);}emitChargers();}function connect(){if(socket){return;}socket=io(resolveServerUrl(),{transports:['websocket'],reconnection:true,reconnectionAttempts:Infinity,reconnectionDelay:1000,reconnectionDelayMax:5000});socket.on('connect',()=>{var _socket;isConnected=true;(_socket=socket)===null||_socket===void 0?void 0:_socket.emit('get_chargers',{});});socket.on('chargers_list',payload=>{chargers=((payload===null||payload===void 0?void 0:payload.chargers)||[]).map(item=>toChargerStatus(item));emitChargers();});socket.on('charger_updated',payload=>{if(!payload||!payload.charger){return;}upsertCharger(toChargerStatus(payload.charger));});socket.on('disconnect',()=>{isConnected=false;});socket.on('connect_error',error=>{console.error('WebSocket connection error:',error);});}function disconnect(){if(socket){socket.disconnect();socket=null;isConnected=false;}}function subscribe(callback){listeners.push(callback);callback([...chargers]);return()=>{listeners=listeners.filter(cb=>cb!==callback);};}function getConnectionStatus(){return isConnected;}export default{connect,disconnect,subscribe,getConnectionStatus};
